title: AGENTS.md
text:
Guidance for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) working in this repository.


Ashutosh Bajpai’s personal blog, built with Quarto.



quarto preview       # Local dev server with live reload
quarto render        # Build site → docs/
uv sync              # Install Python dependencies
Deployment: push to main → GitHub Actions renders and publishes to gh-pages.



posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug/index.qmd    # Blog posts
conferences/YYYY-MM-DD-name/index.qmd  # Conference summaries
_quarto.yml                         # Main site config
posts/_metadata.yml                 # Default post settings
pyproject.toml                      # Python deps (Python 3.13.9)
docs/                               # Rendered output (commit this)
_freeze/                            # Computational cache (commit this)



Create posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug/index.qmd with frontmatter:
---
title: "Post Title"
author: "Ashutosh Bajpai"
date: '2025-01-01'
categories: [Technology, Programming]
---
Use .qmd files (not .md) for all blog posts and conference summaries.




Branches: main (production), feature/description or claude/description-xxxxx
Commit: include docs/ and _freeze/; exclude .quarto/, _site/
Links: never use bare URLs — always wrap in <url> or [text](url) form
Images: place in post directory, compress PNGs with pngquant --quality 60-80
Code blocks: executable Python runs via Jupyter during render; use freeze: false to force re-execution





Build fails → uv sync, then rm -rf _freeze/ && quarto render
Preview stale → restart quarto preview
Deployment issues → check Actions tab logs

title: Ashutosh Bajpai
text:
Cloud Engineering Lead / DevOps Architect with 14+ years of experience designing, deploying, and operating enterprise-grade cloud platforms across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Experienced in building Kubernetes-based SaaS platforms, Infrastructure-as-Code using Terraform, Docker containerization, and CI/CD automation for large-scale distributed systems.
Currently exploring and integrating AI into platform engineering, including AI-assisted automation, intelligent monitoring, and developer productivity solutions. Passionate about building scalable, reliable cloud infrastructure and driving platform standardization while maintaining highly available production environments. I am Ashutosh Bajpai, a passionate technologist and lifelong learner. I enjoy exploring new technologies, building innovative solutions, and sharing my knowledge with the community through writing and open-source contributions.


[Add your professional experience here - describe your current role, previous positions, and areas of expertise]




Technical Blog - My thoughts on technology, software development, and innovation
Personal interests and projects




I’m always interested in connecting with fellow technologists and collaborating on interesting projects. Feel free to reach out via any of the links above.
